name: Ycc2Rgb
operator_description: Converts YCbCr pixel data to RGB color space using fixed-point arithmetic with precomputed lookup tables for JPEG decompression. Implements CCIR 601-1 standard conversion formulas: R = Y + 1.40200 * Cr, G = Y - 0.34414 * Cb - 0.71414 * Cr, B = Y + 1.77200 * Cb. Converts from noninterleaved (one-plane-per-component) format to interleaved pixel format with range-limiting to handle DCT losses.
